claim_bullets.bullet_text: Logical operators are based on truthiness and falsiness, not the strict values true and false. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.99-99)
The ! operator is a logical operator, it always returns true or false. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.99-99)
The ternary operator (?:), ||, and && are control flow operators; they do not always return true or false, and they have short-cut semantics. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.99-99)

source_record_text: JavaScript Allongé explores fundamental and advanced JavaScript concepts, including logical operators and control flow mechanisms.
